name: io.github.Mogacode-ma/elementor-mcp-agent
description: Agency-grade MCP for WordPress Elementor — multi-site, safe edits, templates, versions.

environmentVariables.name: ELEMENTOR_MCP_SITES
environmentVariables.description: JSON array of site objects. Each: {id, url, username, application_password}. See README.

environmentVariables.name: ELEMENTOR_MCP_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Alternative: path to a JSON config file. README has the schema.

environmentVariables.name: ELEMENTOR_MCP_DEFAULT_SITE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default site id when a tool is called without site_id.
